note: Curated seed catalog for the CLI integration. 21 entries across 7 categories (cloud/paas/baas/git/payments/container/workspace). All risk-tier defaults follow business impact: payments/prod-cluster -> ask, everything else -> monitor + blacklist.

entries.name: gcloud
entries.description: Google Cloud Platform CLI for Compute, Storage, IAM, GKE, Cloud Run.

capabilities.description: Google Cloud: list/describe projects, compute instances, Cloud Run services, storage, billing accounts and budgets (cost overview).

entries.name: az
entries.description: Microsoft Azure CLI — Resources, VMs, AKS, Functions.

capabilities.description: Azure: list/show resource groups, VMs, services.

entries.name: aws
entries.description: Amazon Web Services CLI — S3, EC2, Lambda, IAM, and more.

capabilities.description: AWS: list/describe S3, EC2, Lambda resources.

entries.name: wrangler
entries.description: Cloudflare Workers, Pages, R2, D1 CLI.

capabilities.description: Cloudflare: list Workers and Pages projects, tail logs, deploy.

entries.name: vercel
entries.description: Vercel deployments, projects, env variables.

capabilities.description: Vercel: list deployments and projects, inspect builds, read logs, deploy.

entries.name: netlify
entries.description: Netlify Sites, Deployments, Functions, Env.

capabilities.description: Netlify: list sites and deploys, read status.

entries.name: heroku
entries.description: Heroku Apps, Dynos, Addons, Releases.

capabilities.description: Heroku: list apps, dynos, releases; read logs.

entries.name: railway
entries.description: Railway Projects, Services, Deployments.

capabilities.description: Railway: list projects/services, read status and logs.

entries.name: flyctl
entries.description: Fly.io Apps, Machines, Volumes, Secrets.

capabilities.description: Fly.io: list apps and machines, read status and logs.

entries.name: render
entries.description: Render.com Services, Deploys, Logs.

capabilities.description: Render: list services and deploys, read status.

entries.name: supabase
entries.description: Supabase Projects, DB, Edge Functions, Migrations.

capabilities.description: Supabase: list projects, migrations, database status.

entries.name: firebase
entries.description: Firebase Projects, Hosting, Functions, Firestore.

capabilities.description: Firebase: list projects, apps, hosting sites; deploy.

entries.name: pscale
entries.description: PlanetScale MySQL-Branches, Deploy-Requests.

capabilities.description: PlanetScale: list databases, branches, deploy requests.

entries.name: neonctl
entries.description: Neon Serverless Postgres — Projects, Branches, Roles.

capabilities.description: Neon: list projects, branches, databases.

entries.name: gh
entries.description: GitHub Repos, PRs, Issues, Actions, Releases.

capabilities.description: GitHub: list/read/create repos, pull requests, issues, releases, workflow runs.

entries.name: glab
entries.description: GitLab Repos, MRs, Issues, CI/CD, Snippets.

capabilities.description: GitLab: list/read merge requests, issues, pipelines.

entries.name: stripe
entries.description: Stripe Webhooks, Events, Products, Subscriptions.

capabilities.description: Stripe: list customers, charges, invoices, products; read balance.

entries.name: twilio
entries.description: Twilio Numbers, Messages, Voice, Verify, Flex.

capabilities.description: Twilio: list messages, calls, phone numbers.

entries.name: docker
entries.description: Docker Container, Images, Volumes, Networks.

capabilities.description: Docker: list/inspect containers, images, volumes; read logs.

entries.name: kubectl
entries.description: Kubernetes Cluster-Management: Pods, Deployments, Services.

capabilities.description: Kubernetes: get/describe pods, deployments, services; read logs.

entries.name: gam
entries.description: Google Workspace CLI: Calendar events, Gmail messages, Drive, Users.
tool_schema_examples: gam calendar <primary-email> printevents after today before tomorrow
gam user <primary-email> print messages query "is:unread" maxmessages 10

capabilities.description: Google Workspace Calendar: list and read events.
Google Workspace Gmail: list and read messages.

entries.name: jarvisctl
entries.description: Control this Personal Jarvis instance: list/create/cancel tasks, read or switch settings, restart the app, and reach any API endpoint.

capabilities.description: Self-control: inspect and manage Jarvis's own tasks, settings, and lifecycle from the terminal.
